Academic Connections

Short CV

Born in Istanbul on November 30, 1991, Deniz Atacan completed her high school education at Beykoz Anatolian High School. She graduated from Mimar Sinan Fine Arts University, the Department of Philosophy in June 2017. Later, she started the philosophy master program at Mimar Sinan Fine Arts University and she got master's degree with her thesis titled "MerleauPonty's Critique of Cartesian Subject". She continues her doctoral education in the same department.
